cluster.title: Frontend Web App
cluster.summary: Vite + React 19 web client (~102.5k LOC) that hosts the chat-surface SSOT shell: six-destination solo rail, host data binders, a large host-owned ChatScreen run cockpit, and web implementations of the substrate ports. Talks only to backend-facade over /v1 HTTP + SSE through a single WebTransport singleton. Disciplined architecture, but carries ~17.8k LOC of dead folded destinations, a web-only Settings that duplicates chat-surface's, and phantom workspace dependencies.

nodes.summary: App.tsx providers + AuthGate + destination dispatch + MCP OAuth callback; HashRouter (Router-port impl); AppRoute union + folded-slug redirect map; keymap.

AuthContext state machine (bearer via SecretStorage, dev-IdP silent re-auth), LoginScreen (Google / SIWE wallet / local persona), MfaPrompt (WebAuthn), SIWE message builder + EIP-6963 discovery, wallet handoff page.
Second Vite entry: standalone SIWE sign-in page that relays a minted bearer to the desktop app's loopback listener (walletEntry.tsx -> WalletHandoffPage).

Typed /v1 client modules (agentApi, connectorsApi, projectsApi, meApi, authApi, mcpApi, localModelsApi, ...) + useResource hooks; 176 unique facade endpoints; includes 8 dead modules for folded destinations.
Module-singleton WebTransport (from @0x-copilot/chat-transport) owning bearer attachment, 401 notification, and SSE; http.ts helpers route everything through it.

ChatScreen (2.7k LOC) run cockpit + 157 components (thread, tools, workspace pane, details, composer adapters over chat-surface shells) + bespoke Atlas runtime (attachments, dictation, thread primitives).
Pure, replay-safe event reducers: chat items, citations, citation links, sources, subagents, drafts, approvals, MCP auth, run UI state (chatRunState).

Live host binders: ChatsArchiveRoute, ActivityRoute (+activityApi composition), SkillsRoute, ProjectsRoute, TemplateGalleryRoute, TeamGateway, PaletteHost — fetch/compose product endpoints and mount chat-surface destination components.
Connectors destination: gateway (list/detail/webhooks), MCP install wizard overlay, per-chat connector scope hooks, webhooks route.

Web-only SettingsScreen + 17 section panels (profile, appearance, provider keys, local models, MFA, privacy, notifications, workspace/members/billing/audit) + P12 SettingsGateway. Duplicates chat-surface settings pages used by desktop.
UserProfile / UserPreferences contexts + AppearanceContext (single writer for theme/density/motion attrs + debounced server save); share screens; workspace member helpers.
Admin-role-gated tier-2 adapter review queue/detail/preview with synthetic demo states.
Web implementations of chat-surface substrate ports: Badge, Notification (navigates via Router), FilePicker, Clipboard, PortProvider.
Light OTel API surface + idle-loaded SDK chunk exporting OTLP to the same-origin facade passthrough; attribute-allowlist span processor; global error handlers + ErrorBoundary.
DEAD (~17.8k LOC incl. api modules + tests): home, library, inbox, todos, routines, agents, memory, tools features folded out by PR-4.11; parked for the Phase-6C sweep; zero non-test importers.
Vite two-entry build (main + wallet) with route-level code splitting; Docker multi-stage -> nginx:8080 SPA; eslint substrate-boundary config; vitest+jsdom.

edges.label: ChatShell + KV/Secret/Notification/DeploymentProfile providers + ShellDestinationSlug/Router types
lazy ChatScreen chunk mounted on the run destination
eager binder imports on the destination dispatch hot path
lazy SettingsScreen + SettingsGateway routes
PortProvider with Web{Badge,Notification,FilePicker,Clipboard}Port
lazy AdapterReviewScreen behind admin role gate
authApi / devIdpApi / siweApi / mfaApi calls
useKeyValueStore + useSecretStorage ports for persona slug + bearer
EIP-6963 provider discovery + EIP-1193 personal_sign for SIWE
Continue-with-Google redirect via facade /v1/auth/oidc/google/start
walletEntry.tsx renders WalletHandoffPage (SIWE flow only)
packaged desktop opens deployed /wallet.html for SIWE bearer handoff (URL contract)
all http.ts helpers + api modules route through getAppTransport()
WebTransport + UnauthorizedError from @0x-copilot/chat-transport (undeclared in package.json)
176 unique /v1/* endpoints (conversations, runs, approvals, MCP, auth, me, settings, palette, shares, audit, local-models)
run stream /v1/agent/runs/{id}/stream?after_sequence=N + inbox stream + local-model pull stream
dev IdP mint POST /v1/dev/identity/mint (dev only, tree-shaken in prod)
@0x-copilot/api-types payload shapes (241 import sites app-wide)
runtime events fold through applyRuntimeEvent + citation/source/subagent/draft reducers
createRun/streamRunEvents/decideApproval/listMessages etc.
AssistantComposer shell adapter, citations registry + scroll helpers, ComposerHandle
citation registry/link-reducer cores wrapped by thin web shims
ChatsArchive / ActivityDestination / SkillsDestination / ProjectsDestination mounted with host read models
binders compose canonical clients (listConversations + listAuditEvents -> Activity rows)
connectorsApi / mcpApi / webhooksApi
settingsApi, providerKeysApi, localModelsApi, mfaApi, workspaceApi, auditApi
meApi profile/preferences reads + debounced saves
OTLP trace export to same-origin /v1/telemetry/otlp/v1/traces
@0x-copilot/design-system ThemeProvider + styles.css tokens
dead routes import dead api modules (homeApi..toolsApi) — only remaining consumers
ci-frontend.yml builds the Docker image; Dockerfile hand-copies chat-surface/chat-transport/api-types/design-system sources
BACKEND_FACADE_URL dev-proxy target for /v1 (default 127.0.0.1:8200)
implements chat-surface Badge/Notification/FilePicker/Clipboard port interfaces
